# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    host: users-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - users
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/users
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v0
        tags:
          - production
          - api
          - users
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
                - https://admin.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - X-Request-Id
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
          - name: request-transformer
            config:
              add:
                headers:
                  - X-Forwarded-Proto:https
                  - X-Gateway:Kong
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 300
              hour: 10000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

  - name: orders-service
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - orders
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v0
        tags:
          - production
          - api
          - orders
        plugins:
          - name: jwt
            config:
              claims_to_verify:
                - exp
              key_claim_name: iss
              secret_is_base64: false
              run_on_preflight: false
          - name: acl
            config:
              allow:
                - customer
                - admin
              hide_groups_header: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 200
              hour: 5000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

  - name: inventory-service
    host: inventory-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - inventory
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/inventory
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v0
        tags:
          - production
          - api
          - inventory
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
                - x-api-key
              hide_credentials: true
              run_on_preflight: false
          - name: request-size-limiting
            config:
              allowed_payload_size: 10
              size_unit: megabytes
              require_content_length: false
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 120
              hour: 3000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

  - name: payments-service
    host: payments-upstream
    port: 8443
    protocol: https
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 3
    tls_verify: true
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - payments
    routes:
      - name: payments-route
        protocols:
          - https
        methods:
          - POST
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        regex_priority: 0
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v0
        tags:
          - production
          - api
          - payments
        plugins:
          - name: jwt
            config:
              claims_to_verify:
                - exp
              key_claim_name: iss
              secret_is_base64: false
              run_on_preflight: false
          - name: ip-restriction
            config:
              allow:
                - 10.0.0.0/8
                - 192.168.0.0/16
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 60
              hour: 1000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: users-v1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-v2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: orders-a.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-b.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 15
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: inventory-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: payments-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: https
        https_sni: payments.internal
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 5
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
      passive:
        type: https
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
    targets:
      - target: payments-1.internal:8443
        weight: 100
      - target: payments-2.internal:8443
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: prometheus
    enabled: true
  - name: correlation-id
    config:
      header_name: X-Request-Id
      generator: uuid
      echo_downstream: true
  - name: file-log
    config:
      path: /var/log/kong/access.log
      reopen: true
  - name: response-transformer
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - X-Frame-Options:DENY
          - X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff
          - Referrer-Policy:no-referrer
          - X-XSS-Protection:1; mode=block
